name: aisee-plugin
description: AI-Enhanced Software Engineering plugin for OpenSpec and Compound Engineering workflows.

interface.shortDescription: AI-Enhanced Software Engineering for OpenSpec-driven development.
interface.longDescription: Aisee helps teams run OpenSpec-driven development with structured requirements, schema-aware change authoring, project memory, team knowledge guardrails, context packs, and Compound Engineering handoffs.
defaultPrompt: aisee:init 审计 AGENTS.md、OpenSpec 项目配置和 Codex hooks
aisee:change-plan 规划当前需求的 OpenSpec changes
aisee:srs 帮我整理这个需求
